milestones: The output contains all five questions (Q1 through Q5) with their corresponding labeled sections in the specified format
Question 1 states a single, specific research question directly related to LLMs, alignment, fine-tuning, or safety as discussed in the introduction
Question 2 explains broader implications for the research community, discusses impact on future research, and identifies practical applications
Question 3 identifies concrete technical challenges and explicitly explains why naive or straightforward approaches would fail
Question 4 references specific gaps or limitations in prior work (e.g., closed-source models, RLHF cost, reproducibility) and explains how the proposed approach differs from existing methods
Question 5 outlines a concrete methodology specifying the proposed method, dataset(s), and evaluation metrics or benchmarks to be used
